subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, unto him who seeketh his Lord and hath borne in His path what none before him did bear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم لمن اراد ربه و حمل فی سبیله ما لاحمله السابقون
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
